response.justification: Bogdan has strong software engineering experience and some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, including MCP and multi-agent workflows, which aligns with key technologies. However, his resume lacks explicit mentions of production-grade AI solutions, vector databases, RAG architectures, or cloud platform expertise (AWS/GCP/Azure). His AI-related work appears limited to developer tooling rather than core GenAI systems.
strengths: Proven expertise in full-stack development (TypeScript, Python via Node.js, and other languages) with a focus on testable, scalable systems
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, multi-agent workflows) and developer tooling relevant to the role
Strong leadership in open-source projects and mentorship (e.g., workshops, TDD practices, and team contributions)
concerns: No clear evidence of building production-grade AI solutions, vector databases, or RAG architectures in prior roles
Limited explicit experience with major cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) or enterprise GenAI deployments
Resume emphasizes general software engineering over specialized AI/ML or GenAI experience
